title: calystegia collina subsp. collina
intro: Calystegia collina subsp. collina, also known as the field bindweed or creeping jenny, is a perennial climbing plant native to the Mediterranean region and parts of Europe. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, which make it useful for treating digestive issues, muscle spasms, and wounds. The health benefits of Calystegia collina subsp. collina include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and supporting digestive health, among others. Calystegia collina subsp. collina can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
